description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy shaped like a cartoonish animal, likely an alpaca or llama, with a rounded head, small upright ears, and a short tail. Its body is covered in alternating horizontal stripes of bright green and blue, giving it a playful and eye-catching appearance. The face features large, round black eyes, a small black nose, and a simple, friendly smile, all set against a white facial patch. The ears and feet are a soft pink color, contrasting with the main body stripes. The surface texture resembles a knitted or woven fabric, suggesting a soft and cuddly feel. This toy would be appealing to children and could be found in parks, playgrounds, or urban family spaces.
description: A soft, striped plush toy resembling a cartoon alpaca or llama, with green and blue bands, a white face, and pink ears and feet. It has a friendly expression and a knitted texture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's face with large eyes, a white snout, and both pink ears visible.
description_view_1: Left rear view highlights the side of the head, one ear, and the curve of the back with the tail visible.
description_view_2: Back view displays the tail, both hind legs, and the striped pattern wrapping around the body.
description_view_3: Right rear view shows the side of the head, one ear, and the tail, with the stripes continuing along the body.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is friendly and neutral, with large round eyes and a small, simple smile. The absence of eyebrows or exaggerated features gives it a calm and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright on all four legs with the head facing forward and the tail slightly raised.
